name: Inori Yuzuriha
description:
__Height:__ 166 cm (5'5") 
__Occupation:__ Singer, student 
__Partner(s):__ Shu Ouma 
__Affiliation:__ Funeral Parlor  

Inori Yuzuriha is one of the main protagonists of the anime Guilty Crown and a member of the resistance guerrilla group called "Funeral Parlor".  She is also the voice of the internet artist Egoist who sings to release her emotions.  Inori is a very soft, quiet, and sweet girl, who is also very determined to complete her missions successfully and without fail (shown when she was threatened but didn’t show any sign of fear, even when she was about to be killed). She also seems to think she’s a burden to others but tries to protect the people close to her.   She usually comforts Shu and gives him words of strength when she can tell he’s feeling weak and helpless. Gai is dear to Inori, and she tells Shu that he is the one that gave her a name and a world, when no one else has.  As a member of Funeral Parlor, Inori is extremely skilled in forms of combat such as hand-to-hand fighting and marksmanship, to the point where she is able to outmatch and kill several soldiers of the GHQ forces by herself.
